form.formComment: Last start fell at this track on March 22 over 3600m. The start before that; finished third of 16 runners at this track on March 1 over 3600m, 8 len behind Some Of Them carrying 72kg at $3. On his best form is sure to prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. First-up after two months finished fifth of 13 runners at Compiegne in the LR on March 11 over 3600m, 6 len behind Ci Ppo Ra carrying 70.5kg at $11. Previously second-up won by 0.5 len Fontainebleau on October 13 over 3550m on rain affected going defeating L'amie Larissa carrying 71kg at $4 in a hurdle. Key runner - don't underestimate.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up ran on from midfield and won by a long-neck this track on March 22 over 3600m slow going defeating Miss Altea Blue with 62.5kg at $5.50 in a hurdle. Second run from a spell made some head-way from midfield; finished sixth of 10 starters at this track in the LR on April 2 over 3900m, 18 len behind Illusion Machine with 62kg at $5.50. Finds a very nice assignment today and can return to form.

form.formComment: Useful mare. Last outing sat on the speed and boxed on steadily finished fourth of 13 starters at this track on March 22 over 3600m, on slow going 6 len behind Vol D'argent with 69kg at $20. The start before that; finished eighth of 16 runners at this track on March 1 over 3600m, 22 len behind Some Of Them carrying 69.5kg at $15. Appeals as an each way chance if finds best form.
